stage36_data_resolution_summary.json.cheapest_next_step: Add one more free derivatives context family (e.g., Binance taker buy/sell volume or long/short ratio) with the same no-leak alignment and rerun Stage-28 baseline vs enriched.

stage38_logic_audit_summary.json.root_cause: Activation hunt counted NaN active-candidate cells as non-empty strings ('nan'), inflating raw_signal_count while engine final_signal stayed zero.
stage38_logic_audit_summary.json.fix_summary: Normalized active_candidates now maps NaN/None/'nan' to empty before raw-signal gating, and lineage now tracks composer_signal_count explicitly.

stage38_master_summary.json.next_action: Increase upstream candidate signal quality (family/context generation), then rerun Stage-37/38 lineage checks.

stage43_performance_summary.json.runtime_notes: run_stage28 exposes total runtime only; walkforward/monte_carlo remain embedded in replay_backtest runtime.

problems.title: Validation semantics mixed with proxies
problems.remaining_limitations: Still dependent on upstream real artifacts availability per run.

problems.title: Late-stage orchestration acting like validation theater
evidence: scripts/run_stage60_72.py reorders decision stages after real-validation artifacts
problems.remaining_limitations: Legacy stage scripts still exist and can be executed out of order manually.

problems.title: Discovery generator too template-based / weak hypothesis generation
problems.remaining_limitations: Generator remains bounded and still heuristic, not open-ended hypothesis synthesis.

problems.title: Economically identical candidates not deduplicated
problems.remaining_limitations: Near-identical but non-identical fingerprints may still pass.

problems.title: Ranking too proxy-heavy and not candidate-specific enough
evidence: stage48 ranking now includes candidate-specific rr/cost/exp_lcb/reject penalties
problems.remaining_limitations: Some global label priors remain in stage48 score composition.

problems.title: Walk-forward validation not sufficiently real / artifact-backed
problems.remaining_limitations: If stage67 cannot run, fallback evidence remains insufficient.

problems.title: Monte Carlo not sufficiently real / artifact-backed
problems.remaining_limitations: Monte Carlo is still simplified and not a full trade-path simulator.

problems.title: Cross-seed weak and should become cross-perturbation robustness
problems.remaining_limitations: Perturbation design is still basic and not exhaustive across market regimes.

problems.title: Transfer validation can be synthetic / defaulted
problems.remaining_limitations: No guaranteed real transfer dataset is produced in all environments.

problems.title: Important config blocks not fully wired into actual stage behavior
problems.remaining_limitations: Not all legacy config sections are fully wired end-to-end.

problems.title: Funding realism incomplete in core backtest flow
evidence: backtest engine now applies funding_cost_for_trade with funding_pct_per_day
problems.remaining_limitations: Funding model is simplified and not venue-specific signed funding.

problems.title: Position sizing too simplistic / unrealistic
evidence: backtest engine now supports full_equity/fixed_fraction/risk_budget sizing modes
problems.remaining_limitations: Sizing still single-position and lacks richer portfolio/risk interactions.

problems.title: Reproducibility incomplete
evidence: stage71 stable hash-based seed mapping replaces Python hash() nondeterminism
problems.remaining_limitations: Full deterministic replay still depends on full pipeline input immutability.

problems.title: Campaign memory can break reproducibility
evidence: stage69 cold_start_each_run + deduplicated sorted memory rows + frozen mode override
problems.remaining_limitations: Historical memory remains mutable when cold_start_each_run is disabled.

problems.title: Data continuity / missing-candle handling not strict enough
problems.remaining_limitations: Strict continuity mode is configurable and can still be disabled.

problems.title: Docs / status semantics misleading
problems.remaining_limitations: Older docs outside stage chain may still contain legacy semantics.

problems.title: Performance claims partly projected rather than measured
problems.remaining_limitations: Stage55 still depends on external runtime probe files for FULL measured status.

problems.title: UI can create false confidence by hiding provenance / evidence quality
evidence: UI pages now surface decision_evidence_allowed/missing_real_sources/final verdict evidence flags
problems.remaining_limitations: UI still allows reading legacy summaries that may predate semantic fixes.

problems.title: Tests do not sufficiently validate scientific correctness
evidence: New tests added: validation evidence, continuity, backtest realism, stage57 evidence semantics, stage67 real artifacts, stage53 replay artifact
problems.remaining_limitations: Not all scientific assumptions are covered by deterministic end-to-end tests.

problems.title: Search space too narrow / regime-limited
evidence: stage70 expanded families + structured hypothesis components + diversity checks
problems.remaining_limitations: Search space remains constrained and handcrafted.

problems.title: Architecture has parallel stage ecosystems with semantic drift
evidence: stage60_72 orchestration now centralizes final decision ordering with real evidence prerequisites
problems.remaining_limitations: Parallel legacy stage ecosystems still exist in repository.

problems.title: SUCCESS status semantics misleading
evidence: stage summaries now include execution_status/validation_state and downgrade status on insufficient decision evidence
problems.remaining_limitations: Legacy SUCCESS/PARTIAL contract remains for backward compatibility.

problems.title: Late-stage ML stack can create false confidence
problems.remaining_limitations: ML stack still present; misuse outside declared reporting-only role remains possible.

problems.title: Metrics edge cases / pathological states can pollute ranking and reports
evidence: backtest metrics sanitize inf/nan and cap pathological profit_factor
problems.remaining_limitations: Metric clipping threshold choices remain heuristic.

problems.title: Runtime truth not sufficiently proven in a clean verification path
evidence: full_trace report now includes evidence_quality/source_types and stage sequence hashes
problems.remaining_limitations: Clean runtime truth still depends on successful offline chain execution in current environment.

repo_state_at_start.start_state_note: The final completion step started from a clean feature branch. The active in-progress implementation already existed as committed work ahead of main and was treated as the repair baseline.

plan_before_coding.rationale: Stage-74 needed final evidence artifacts and GitHub workflow capture on top of already-integrated source repairs.

unified_paths: Shared candidate runtime powers replay, walk-forward, Monte Carlo, cross-perturbation, and transfer execution.
Decision evidence semantics are centralized and consumed by Stage57 and Stage61.
UI/full-trace reporting now reads the same evidence-quality fields used by the decision chain.
remaining_splits: Older stage ecosystems still exist outside the late-stage repaired chain.
Generator and ranker remain bounded heuristic systems rather than a full research DSL.

problem_resolution.title: Validation semantics mixed with proxies
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Strict provenance and decision gating now enforced.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Legacy non-decision summaries can still exist outside the repaired path.

problem_resolution.title: Late-stage orchestration validation theater
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Real artifacts are materialized before final gating and blocked metrics are surfaced.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Legacy stages remain independently runnable.

problem_resolution.title: Discovery generator too template-heavy
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Generator now uses context/trigger/confirmation/invalidation/exit/time-stop structure.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Still bounded and heuristic.

problem_resolution.title: Dedup/ranking not candidate-specific enough
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Economic fingerprints and more candidate-specific ranking inputs were added.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Global priors still remain.

problem_resolution.title: Walk-forward not fully real and decision-enforced
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Real walk-forward artifacts are produced and blocked when they fail.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Current candidate still fails.

problem_resolution.title: Monte Carlo not fully real and decision-enforced
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Real Monte Carlo artifact path exists and blocked states are honored.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Model remains a bounded bootstrap approximation.

problem_resolution.title: Cross-seed not upgraded to cross-perturbation
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Cross-perturbation artifacts replaced weak cross-seed semantics.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Perturbation breadth is still limited.

problem_resolution.title: Transfer validation synthetic or unresolved
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Stage58 now writes real transfer artifacts and blocks fake/default evidence.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Current candidate still depends on Stage57 being sufficient.

problem_resolution.title: Important config blocks not wired
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Late-stage runtime now emits used_config_keys and effective_values.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Not all legacy config sections are fully wired.

problem_resolution.title: Funding realism incomplete
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Funding is now applied in the core economics path.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Funding model is still simplified.

problem_resolution.title: Position sizing too simplistic
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Deterministic sizing modes were expanded.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Still single-position and simplified.

problem_resolution.title: Reproducibility incomplete
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Hash-based deterministic seed mapping and explicit reproducibility fields were added.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Frozen mode is not forced by default.

problem_resolution.title: Campaign memory harms reproducibility
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Cold-start and explicit memory controls reduce silent state carryover.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Memory can still affect runs when enabled.

problem_resolution.title: Data continuity too weak
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Gap diagnostics are explicit and visible to validation.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Strict mode remains configurable.

problem_resolution.title: Docs/status/report/UI mislead evidence quality
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Stage reports and UI now expose stage_role, execution_status, validation_state, and evidence quality.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Legacy artifacts still exist historically.

problem_resolution.title: Performance claims projected not measured
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Projection-only performance is now explicitly downgraded.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Measured runtime still depends on local probe artifacts.

problem_resolution.title: Scientific tests insufficient
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Scientific correctness coverage was materially strengthened.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Still not exhaustive across the entire repo.

problem_resolution.title: Search space too narrow
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Search expansion now composes economically structured hypotheses.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Still bounded and handcrafted.

problem_resolution.title: Parallel architecture drift
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Shared candidate runtime now powers replay/validation/transfer.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Older parallel ecosystems still exist elsewhere.

problem_resolution.title: SUCCESS semantics misleading
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Execution status is now separated from validation state and stage role.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Outer SUCCESS/PARTIAL contract remains for compatibility.

problem_resolution.title: Late-stage ML can create false confidence
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Stage66 is explicitly reporting-only and cannot authorize decisions.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Manual misuse outside the governed flow remains possible.

problem_resolution.title: Pathological metrics pollute ranking/reports
runtime_evidence: pytest includes pathological metric sanitization coverage
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Metric sanitization now blocks inf/NaN/pathological PF contamination.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Threshold choices remain heuristic.

problem_resolution.title: Runtime truth path not cleanly verifiable
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Full trace plus Stage60_72 now provide a cleaner offline truth path.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: Current candidate still fails major gates and frozen mode is optional.

problem_resolution.title: GitHub workflow not PR-only
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Stage-74 now uses a feature branch and an open PR against main instead of direct-main integration.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: PR-first workflow is enforced by process and main protection, not by local git alone.

problem_resolution.title: Repository protection/rules missing
runtime_evidence: protection_detail=main requires pull request before merge with 1 approval
problem_resolution.implementation_summary: Main branch protection is now active with required pull requests and one approval.
problem_resolution.remaining_limitations: The protection is intentionally minimal and does not add heavy status-check bureaucracy.

new_invariants: Proxy, synthetic, and reporting-only evidence cannot drive final verdicts.
Artifact-backed real evidence can still be blocked from decision use when validation_state says it failed.
Transfer cannot pass without a real transfer artifact and a passing Stage57 verdict.
Late-stage ML is reporting-only and has no decision authority.
Stage execution status is separate from scientific validation state.

local_cleanup_performed: Generated verification logs were handled through .gitignore patterns instead of destructive deletion.
No source files were removed during final Stage-74 reporting work.

github_results.protection_detail: main requires pull request before merge with 1 approval

reduced_false_confidence: Decision gating now blocks real-but-failed validation metrics instead of treating them as automatically promotable.
Transfer is now real and explicit instead of synthetic/defaulted.
UI and reports now surface evidence quality, blocked metrics, and stage roles.
still_scientifically_weak: The current candidate still fails replay, walk-forward, Monte Carlo, and cross-perturbation gates.
Generator breadth and ranking economics remain bounded rather than exhaustive.

controls_now_present: Deterministic seed mapping in stage71 replay acceleration.
Frozen research mode surfaced in runtime parameters and stage67 effective values.
Campaign memory controls now explicit in full trace.
remaining_nondeterminism: Frozen mode is not forced by default.
External data snapshots and mutable memory/caches can still change behavior when exploratory mode is used.

hard_truths: The late-stage chain is now more honest, but the current candidate still does not demonstrate a robust edge.
Monte Carlo and cross-perturbation are real enough to block false promotion, but they are not yet exhaustive robustness science.
The architecture is cleaner in the repaired chain, not globally unified across the entire historical repo.

local_cleanup_performed: Generated verification logs were handled through .gitignore patterns instead of destructive deletion.
No source files were removed during final Stage-74 reporting work.

github_results.protection_detail: main requires pull request before merge with 1 approval

reduced_false_confidence: Decision gating now blocks real-but-failed validation metrics instead of treating them as automatically promotable.
Transfer is now real and explicit instead of synthetic/defaulted.
UI and reports now surface evidence quality, blocked metrics, and stage roles.
still_scientifically_weak: The current candidate still fails replay, walk-forward, Monte Carlo, and cross-perturbation gates.
Generator breadth and ranking economics remain bounded rather than exhaustive.

controls_now_present: Deterministic seed mapping in stage71 replay acceleration.
Frozen research mode surfaced in runtime parameters and stage67 effective values.
Campaign memory controls now explicit in full trace.
remaining_nondeterminism: Frozen mode is not forced by default.
External data snapshots and mutable memory/caches can still change behavior when exploratory mode is used.

hard_truths: The late-stage chain is now more honest, but the current candidate still does not demonstrate a robust edge.
Monte Carlo and cross-perturbation are real enough to block false promotion, but they are not yet exhaustive robustness science.
The architecture is cleaner in the repaired chain, not globally unified across the entire historical repo.

stage_sequence.stage: Stage-36 - Data Resolution and Final Enrichment
